results.rendered_html:
āmnā 1 P.
1 (a) To hand down traditionally or in sacred texts; bhavatpraṇītamācāramāmanaṃti hi sādhavaḥ  Ku. 6. 31 ; evaṃ kila sūtrakārā āmanaṃti  Māl. 7.  (b) Hence, to regard, consider, mention, lay down; tvāmāmanaṃti prakṛtiṃ puruṣārthapravartinīṃ  Ku. 2. 13 , 5. 81 ;  M. 1. 4 ;  Bk. 18. 5 ;  Kām. 8. 24 ;  U. 5 ;  Mv. 4. 30. 
2 To keep in mind, commit to memory, learn, study, repeat; āmananmaṃtramuttamaṃ  Bk. 17. 30 ; yad brahma samyagāmnātaṃ  Ku. 6. 16  learnt.
3 To celebrate, hail.
